programmes.show_description: In the first of a series of playlists from acts playing this year's Supersonic festival, S from Ameretat plays an hour of his favourite punk, metal, and hardcore tracks.
Another chance to hear Mark Lamarr in full swing from October 2009.
Live sessions by Van Der Graaf Generator, James Levy and The Blood Red Rose, Axis: Sova, and Californian rockers Night are in concert in 1980.
Soundtrack the early hours with back-to-back music, plus exclusive BBC sessions.
Amy Lamé fires up Thursday with the biggest tunes and future classics, plus another pick from this week's 5Before6 DJ!
Nia Archives joins Nick to chat about her new music.
Nemone is in for Lauren with the finest blend of fantastic music for your morning.
Euan from Irish rock band Cardinals joins Chris to chat about their new album 'Masquerade' and upcoming live dates.
Emily has handpicked music, old and new, plus we round up the gigs, shows and festivals that everybody is talking about in today's Gig Lisztomania.
Reviewing this week's new releases.
Start your weekend early with a guest mix from North Carolina DJ and producer, GRRL. GRRL's latest album, Beetle, is out now via A.G. Cook's PC Music.
Marc Riley plays his music loves from every era and genre.
The trio supply an exclusive mix for their final episode. Bringing you sounds from across Africa, dub, gospel, 90's Hip-Hop and 70s funk...with a bespoke Young Fathers twist!
Get your fix of all the best new releases in one handy playlist.
Wesley Jospeh on his debut record and ex-Black Midi outfit My New Band Believe and Gretel breakdown their new LPs. Plus, Matt Everitt picks tunes from Squarepusher and Lime Garden.
Soundtrack the early hours with back-to-back music, plus exclusive BBC sessions.
6 Music goes back to the 90s!
6 Music goes back to the 00s!
Chris Hawkins takes you through 30 minutes of remixed, re-versioned and reimagined tracks.
Amy Lamé has all the best new music to get you through to your weekend. Get in touch with your Friday shouts, mentions and requests. WhatsApp 03700 100 600 or text 64046.
Comedians Roisin Conaty and Sara Pascoe join Nick to chat about their new series Zero Stars, in which they visit holiday destinations with particularly baffling online reviews.
Musician, writer, actor Adele Bertei shares her Desert Island Disco.
The weekend is basically here, so Chris is giving YOU permission to start the party early... That's right, let's Down Tools with LOADS of amazing tunes to get us going.
It's Friday, so Emily is out to prove that any song sounds better when it's played on 6 Music today - so let us know what you want to hear.

programmes.show_name: The People's Party with Femi Koleoso
programmes.show_description: Ease from the end of your working week with joyful global selections. A place where people come together through their shared love of music.
Nothing but solid gold upbeat indie bangers with Nathan Shepherd; a throwback to the indie tunes you love with a sprinkling of the finest future hits.
Gary Jarman from The Cribs takes over the Indie Forever playlist!

programmes.show_name: The 6 Mix with Mary Anne Hobbs
programmes.show_description: Quiet Husband is the DJ and producer alias of British multidisciplinary artist Richie Culver. A visceral project rooted in the industrial landscapes and rave culture of Hull.
